title: Gastronomy
description: A complete overhaul for the Minecraft food system, with foods and crops
body:
## An ultimate all-in-one food overhaul for Minecraft. 

### **Currently the mod has:**
- Fish - very nutritious, good food source
- Fries - not that good, and oily
- Salad - plant, what can be eventually washed with water into 5 washed salads which is one of the best food sources in the game. It can be grown with bonemeal. It grows on grass

### Recipes

Making fries

![Making fries](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e71967924e0df3377b93503cf53f1d4299cc116.png)

Fish regrowth from their skeleton

![Fish regrowth from their skeleton](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa54c44a106dcebc44c228dbf8007657a1187a5c.png)

Cook seafish in the blast furnace to get cooked fish

![Cook seafish in the blast furnace to get cooked fish](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b73a277ee160c46b764a8216636a01ff1ee22aef.png)

Making Heating Water in the brewing station

![Making Heating Water in the brewing station](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9732d3c5e30cca30707bc84478084278532a5b4c.png)


## Plans

Currently we're making the functional block "Oven" that the mechanic will use to do these cookin' things
We'll expand the availability of real foods and drinks





If you have any question, or you just want to relax, feel free to join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/mwQgGjEy2j)

_The mod is still under development, so there could be bugs or other problems._
